creator: uros@gruber.si
text:
Thanks Dave for moving this forward. I've done some work myself over the weekend and was able to prepare working version 7.18.1. I'll open PR on github repo so if you're ok to move conversation there just to clear some of my questions. 

I'll do my best to upgrade it even further until I hit this cgroup issue. I believe it was included in 7.20.x or something.
